steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The key signal is “sharpened” paired with the contrast word “Although.” Sharpened means making something clearer and more focused. The sentence structure sets up: knowledge was once ____, but recent analyses have sharpened it. So the blank must describe an unclear or vague state.

steps.title: Match the word to the contrast
steps.content: ”Nebulous” expresses the vagueness that “sharpened” overcomes. The other three don't fit: “intricate” implies complexity, “unprecedented” concerns novelty, and “concrete” contradicts the need for sharpening. That matches choice A — A is correct.
